label: Graph Integrity

deductions.evidence: Slugs: tibial-shaft-fracture, femoral-shaft-fracture, labrum, unicompartmental-knee-arthroplasty, patellar-tendon, gluteus-minimus, femoral-nerve, femur, proximal-femur, hip-capsule, quadriceps-tendon, cruciate-ligaments, short-external-rotators, tibia, gluteus-medius, cross-linked-polyethylene, ceramic-on-ceramic-bearing
deductions.reason: Orphan entities cannot be traversed by products and indicate incomplete graph wiring.
deductions.suggestedFix: Add inbound or outbound clinical/anatomy edges, or merge duplicates.

deductions.evidence: Disconnected: labrum, patellar-tendon, gluteus-minimus, femoral-nerve, femur, proximal-femur, hip-capsule, quadriceps-tendon, cruciate-ligaments, short-external-rotators, tibia, gluteus-medius
deductions.reason: Anatomy must connect to the condition graph for educational traversal.
deductions.suggestedFix: Add involves_anatomy, injured_in, or part_of edges from condition/procedure anchors.

deductions.evidence: conflict-report.json: Conflicting labels for labrum: "Glenoid Labrum" vs "Acetabular Labrum"
deductions.reason: Unresolved merge conflicts indicate inconsistent agent outputs.
deductions.suggestedFix: Run conflict-resolver agent and reconcile metadata/text conflicts.

recommendations: Add inbound or outbound clinical/anatomy edges, or merge duplicates.
Add involves_anatomy, injured_in, or part_of edges from condition/procedure anchors.
Run conflict-resolver agent and reconcile metadata/text conflicts.
